Welcome to
Yawn’s World.
A global
brand with
purpose

Yawn is more than a meme coin. It’s a community, way of life and a globally recognized brand.

BUY $YAWN

Meet Yawn, The
sleepiest member
of the group

He slept through his chance to join the Boys' Club, a regret he's carried ever since. Now, Yawn is launching $YAWN, the first meme token letting holders benefit from Yawn-branded ventures. Our mission is to make Yawn a household name and build a community that amplifies our brand's influence. It's Yawn's world; you're just living in it.

Yawn Tribe:
Connect on
Telegram

Stay in the loop with real-time updates, discussions, and exclusive insights by joining the Yawn community on Telegram. It’s where the Yawn tribe gathers to share, learn, and grow together.


Join TG community

(GET YOUR $YAWN)

Where to Buy
the Sleepiest
Token

Uniswap

Trade $YAWN tokens easily and securely on Uniswap, the leading decentralized exchange for swapping tokens directly from your wallet.

Go to Uniswap

(YAWN BY THE NUMBERS)

Key Stats
and Security

2 BILLION

Liquidity Locked

Ensuring stability and trust, our DEX liquidity is locked and reviewed every quarter.

10%

Development Fund

A dedicated fund for continuous project development to support Yawn’s growth.

5%

Marketing Fund

Reserved for marketing initiatives, this fund is to fuel strategic promotions.

5%

CEX fund

Set aside for Centralized Exchange listings and partnerships, bolstering the token’s accessibility and market presence.

Audited for safety. Cyberscope is one of the top 3 auditors in the crypto space. Your funds are safu.

From Meme to
Mainstream

Key Phases in the Evolution of Yawn’s World

E-Commerce Launch

  • Token Launch: A fair and transparent launch setting new standards.
  • Marketing Blitz: Comprehensive campaigns across major platforms.
  • Brand Establishment: Integration into everyday consumer products.

NFT Integration and Expansion

  • NFT Collection: Exclusive access to future perks.
  • Major Exchange Listings: Boosting liquidity and exposure.
  • Strategic Growth: Expanding  to 20,000 holders.

Innovative Technology Implementation

  • GPU/Node Services: Renting and lending platform.
  • AI Sleep App: Optimizing sleep patterns.
  • Trading & Wallet App: AI-powered crypto management.

Gaming and DAO Evolution

  • Game Development: Integrating token and NFTs.
  • Community Milestone: Growing to 100,000 holders.
  • DAO Empowerment: Community-driven future direction.
